breaking.title: Shooting in US on fourth of July: 8, including 4 children, injured in Brooklyn's Coney Island
breaking.summary: Tragedy struck Coney Island on Friday night as a shooting left at least eight people injured, including four young children. The incident occurred around 10:37 pm, with victims ranging from six to 37 years old. While most are in stable condition, a 21-year-old woman is critically injured. Police have recovered a firearm but no arrests have been made as investigations continue into the disturbing event.

breaking.title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
breaking.summary: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.

breaking.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
breaking.summary: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.

breaking.title: What Warren Buffett learnt from buying his first stock at age of 11 amid World War II
breaking.summary: Warren Buffett, commonly referred to as the ‘Oracle of Omaha', was born on August 30, 1930 in the town of Omaha, in the US. He studied under the legendary value investor Benjamin Graham while pursuing a business degree at Columbia University.

breaking.title: Government withdraws emergency gas curbs imposed during Hormuz disruption as LNG supplies normalise
breaking.summary: The Ministry said the situation has since improved, with a ceasefire in place, negotiations underway and maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz resuming.

breaking.title: "No One Talking About CBSE Class 10": Students' Anxiety Over Result Delay, Admission Deadlines
breaking.summary: CBSE Class 10 passing documents will be issued after the second board exam results.

breaking.title: Crypto dispute emerges in foreign women gangrape case involving Pakistan Dy PM Ishaq Dar’s relative
breaking.summary: In her statement, the woman alleged that both of them were restrained and locked inside a room by the attackers before Raza Dar repeatedly demanded access to a computer and cryptocurrency funds.

breaking.title: "Quit Immediately": Pakistan Deputy PM Faces Flak After Grandson Arrested For Rape
breaking.summary: Police sources said Raza Dar is Ishaq Dar's grandson.
